titleStmt.title: SII 11.129: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 129. (B.K. No. 2 of 1927-28.) SAVAḌI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE LEANING AGAINST THE FRONT WALL OF THE VILLAGE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This slightly damaged inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI). It describes at length the heroic qualities of the chief Āchugi and his son Bhūlōkamalla Permāḍi, a Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, who possessed the ‘five great sounds’, who was worshipper of the feet of Bhūlōkamalladēva and was the ruler of Kisukāḍu Seventy, Bāgaḍage Seventy and Nareyaṁgal Twelve. It registers the grant of land made by Gaṅgara Bāchimayya to Chandrabhūshaṇa-Paṇḍita, for the benefit of the temple of Mūlasthānadēva at Sayiḍi (called also Sayyaḍi) and for feeding ascetics. The charity was to be administered by the Four-Hundred Mahājanas of the place.
The inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 7, Dundubhi, Phālguṇa, ba. pañchamī, Monday. Ba. pañchamī in the given month was not Monday but Saturday, 11th March, A.D. 1083.
1 The letters dandu are engraved above the line.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya ṣaṁbhavē © ©
© namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇaka ṇāyatē
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vi
jayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrākkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ©
tatpādārādhaka nudyatpura vābhīḷōtpāṭanapaṭu ripuba
ḷavatpannagagaruḍaneseva nācugidēvaṁ . ḍire ghaṭātaṭāgradoḍasādhipudunna
ti maṁdarakke kōḍiḍuvudu kīrtti doḍavuṭṭidu doppuvamaradrumakke nūrmma
ḍi paḍirūpudarppakana gāḍiyane ripu mēṁ paḍiye vicārisalkita
ra rācugidēvanoḷaṁtu nōrppaḍa . Ā nṛpaputraṁ vidviṣṭadānavadānavavirōdhi nijakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ śrīniḷayaneseda vidyānidhi bhūlōkamalla permmāḍinṛpa . Ā mahāmaṁḍaḷē śvarana
prabhāvamenteṁdaḍe . kadavīra rāridirccida śubhaṭarbhbha
yaṁbaḍe virōdhigaḷu maṁḍaḷikarānatarā gada vairibhūpa
rā rkkadanadoḷeṁdu baṇnipudu permmanṛpāḷana sāhasaṁgaḷa [.] Aṟiyade pagegoṁḍeve nutteṟagido
ḍānaṟiye māṟāṁta taṟidu nōḍe neṟedu miṟe miṟemiṟuguvudu bhu
jāsi permmabhūpāḷakana . baḷavadripunṛpatitamaḥpraḷayakaraṁ tadvadhūdṛgutpaḷaku
ḷaka�ṭumaḷitahrada du ravimaṁḍaḷamo taravāri permmabhūpāḷakana . svasti samadhiga
tapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ . virōdhimaṁḍaḷika māhēśvaraṁ . duṣṭamaṁḍaḷika sarabha
bhēruṁḍaṁ . pagemeccegaṁḍaṁ . śaraṇāgatanṛpā(pā)ḷasaranidhi sakaḷavidyānidhi . rasagīta kautuka
sudhāsāradhārākaraṁ . ripupuratripuragaṁgādharaṁ . nijakuḷakuvaḷayasudhākaraṁ . gaṁbhī
ravīrākaraṁ . dēvadvijagurupūjāsaṁtarppaṇaṁ . maṁḍaḷikamukhadarppaṇaṁ . nirvvikāra manasi
jākāraṁ parāṁganādūraṁ . catussamayadharmmadharmmanandanaṁ . sakaḷavaṁdibṛṁdaravinaṁdanaṁ . satya
bratasurasaritsutanuṁ . Aparimānamānamahimānidhānaṁ . durddharārātimadanivāraṇa .
nayyanagandhavāraṇaṁ . bhūlōkamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ . parabaḷasādhakaṁ . nāmādisama
staprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhūlōkamallapermmāḍidēva rkkisukāḍeppa
ttumaṁ bāgaḍage yeppattumaṁ nareyaṁgalu panneraḍumaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyiṁ du
ṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷdarasugeyyuttamire . © sayiḍiya nā
lnūrvvara permmeyentene . svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyudayanavaratādhyaya
nādhyāpanayajanayājanadānapratigrahakriyāsakta rmmanuyājñavalkipra
ṇītasmritivihitadharmmānuraktaruṁ rāmāyaṇabhāratādipurāṇārtthavicārakōvi
da rvyākaraṇavēdāṁgavidyāviśārada rpparōpakārārtthasaṁpāditārttharuṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭa
pratipāḷanasamētaru śrīmūlasthānadēvapādārādhakaru śrīmatu sayyaḍiya Ū
rūḍeyapramukha mahājanaṁ dharmmaṁgaḷa svadharmadiṁ surakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamire
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada Ēḷeneya duṁdubhisaṁtsura phālguṇada bahuRead saṁvatsara.
ḷa paṁcami sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmūlasthānadēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍaḻphuṭitajī rṇnō
ddhārakaṁ tapōdhanarāhāradānakkameṁdu gaṁgara bācimayyaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇapaṁḍitara kā
laṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakkaṁ māḍi beḷkeṟeyiṁ teṁkalu biṭṭa keyi mattaru 24 matta bhagavati
ya Antu mattaru 36 mattaṁ dēvara nityapūjege biṭṭa
pūdōṁṭa yiṁ teṁkalu dēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa telligavane
Intī dharmmama māgi nālnūrvvaruṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru
Intī dharmma prayāge vāraṇāsi yarghyatīrtthe gurukṣētra
puṇya brāhmaṇargge sahasrakapiḷegaḷanaḷaṁkārasahi
Idanaḷidavarā tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷā brāhmaṇaruma
. svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasu
rā jāyatē krimiḥ . nāgōja besageyda
Digital edition of SII 11.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
